description: Multi-step PySpark DataFrame pipeline in a single Dagster asset (Catalyst-optimized across all steps).

outputs.description: Either materialized to one or more sinks (parquet/table/jdbc) or returned as pandas (sink kind=none)

operations.description: Flat shape: PySpark DataFrame ops. Supported: filter, select, drop, rename, with_columns, group_by, sort, limit, distinct, drop_nulls, join, union, sql.

steps.description: Multi-step form. Each step: {id, source: {kind: parquet|table|jdbc|upstream|ref|..., ...}, operations: [...]}. 'op: sql' uses createOrReplaceTempView('self' + step ids) + spark.sql(...).

sinks.description: Multi-step form. Each sink: {from: <step_id>, kind: parquet|csv|json|delta|table|jdbc|none, path/table/url, mode}.
